stemHtml: Two identical aeroplanes A and B have masses of 1000 kg and 700 kg respectively. In a glide descent at the speed for best glide, what is true regarding the glide range and time?

options.a: Aeroplane B has a longer glide range, but both aeroplanes glide for the same time
options.b: Aeroplane A has a longer glide range, but both aeroplanes glide for the same time
options.c: Both aeroplanes have the same glide range, but aeroplane A has a shorter glide time
options.d: Both aeroplanes have the same glide range and time
